summary: Vibrant audience capture of a super‑hot show, with the crowd’s joy shining through.
review: The reviewer raves about the sheer excitement of the audience and rates the set five stars, indicating an enthusiastic performance. While no technical details are given, the recording is praised for its energy and appears to be an audience tape that conveys the live atmosphere well.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic review (5 ★) focuses on crowd excitement; no technical criticism, so a high rating is justified but confidence is limited by the single data point.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on clarity or mix; praised for capturing crowd atmosphere.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review provides no detail on set structure; overall vibe described as "super hot" and highly enjoyable.
